response.overview: Tickets to Hell is an original underground compilation film series written, edited, and produced by Guerrilla Retro Labs. Utilizing entirely public domain and archival elements, the film blends surreal, historical, and shocking vintage footage into a seamless, lo-fi cinematic experience. Released in a highly limited run of 60 physical VHS tapes, it stands as a unique tribute to the golden era of independent physical media.
response.title: Tickets to hell
